# AppClipAdvancedExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Attributes.Place

**Object**

The place information of an advanced App Clip experience you create with this request.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppClipAdvancedExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Attributes.Place
```

## Discussion

Apple Maps uses any location data that you provide solely for matching an App Clip experience to an existing location. If it can’t find a match, Apple Maps doesn’t use the provided location data.

## Objects

- **AppClipAdvancedExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Attributes.Place.DisplayPoint**: A point-based representation of a place in Apple Maps.
- **AppClipAdvancedExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Attributes.Place.MainAddress**: The main address for a point of interest or business in Apple Maps.
- **AppClipAdvancedExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Attributes.Place.PhoneNumber**: The phone number of a point of interest or business in Apple Maps.
